goodtransgirl:

sapphic-dice:

Today is roach dissection day!!! ^>^


Vengence upon the foul little beasts shall be mine!

Glad to see cutting them up doesn’t bug you! 😝

Yeah, but living with them doesn’t make grub very apitizing.

Absolutely! I mean, if you saw them in a restaurant, you’d be totally in the right to flea!
